title: calpidia longirostris
intro: Calpidia longirostris, also known as the "Centaury" or "Knapweed Balsam", is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calpidia longirostris include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Calpidia longirostris include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
